examples: My starving soul nearly screamed with each voluptuous bite of silky roasted vegetables and chewy crust.
There was an almost voluptuous feeling to being clean again after having had a shower.
There is something voluptuous in the rage inspired by the kind of meanness we are used to calling Dickensian.
Those voluptuous curves are stupidly strong: 'undentable by human force' apparently, but also incredibly light.
The beer's brewers describe it as "a stunning blonde beer, full-bodied, with a voluptuous hop aroma".
